title: Purpose
doc_html:
CHAPTER 2.  CONTEMPT

Art. 1503.  Purpose

The purpose of this Chapter is to provide procedures for allowing each juvenile court to enforce its orders and maintain proper court decorum.

Acts 1991, No. 235, §15, eff. Jan. 1, 1992.
